calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAMSARA INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Elizabeth Anastasi, Esq., of Franklin Law P.C., (424) 258-5129, for Plaintiff.
Shahram Samie, Esq., of Littler Mendelson, P.C., (310) 553-0308, for Defendant.

The subject matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
